title: What an American thinks about Monaco

transcript.text: All right, Monaco, when I think about Monaco, um, Monaco, as far as I could tell, was pretty
Much just a part of France. It was just another satellite of France. I speak French and it's
Just one city that's like as big as a city and that's it. Um, and yeah, and that didn't
Seem, I, yeah, like one girl, I bought a grapefruit and she like totally freaked out
On me because she, I was trying, I, like I gave it to her to weigh, like they sell you
By how much it weighs in America. And she goes, and I was like, I was like, what? And she
Goes, it's by the peace, like screaming at me. And I was like, I mean, I was offended afterwards.
I was like, you know, you don't need to like, I mean, screaming at like top of her lungs.
Like I was supposed to understand her language at PA. Um, and it was really expensive too.
And then like the happy meal was like eight bucks. Um, we tried to get in, I hung out,
I was hanging out with some Australian kids and we tried to get into the, uh, into the,
Uh, just the, uh, what's it called? The, uh, the casino, but they didn't let them cause
They weren't old enough. I probably should have gone in myself to check it out. But, um,
I saw their aquarium, they have a nice aquarium, but I was just there like a day or two. Um,
But that's Monaco. It was just like another confirmation of how French people are just
Really angry with you just cause you're American and the Spanish. So that's basically Monaco.
Oh, and I took a train there too. And I was with this like Canadian kid and he gave the train
Ticket guy checker his ticket. And I guess the ticket guy didn't like his ticket cause he looked
At it and he took it like it was like infected with a virus or something. I guess he thought
It was like folded wrong or something. And he's like, did the, did the French lip thing
And then like gave him dirty look as he gave it back. I guess maybe he thought he was American
Or something. Maybe that's why all the Canadians put Canadian flags on their backpacks.
So they don't have to deal with people being pissed off at him all the time. But yeah, that's
Monaco. It was pretty though. There was lots of boats in the harbor and lots of like apartment
Buildings built up on really steep cliffs all the way up with kind of like a Cape town,
Like cliffs lining the whole, the whole bay of the city. So Monaco.
